# API Documentation

API documentation for hooksmith 0.1.0

## hook-builder



### Dependencies

- anyhow
- chrono
- serde
- serde_json
- tokio
- tracing
- wasmparser
- wasmtime
- wat
- which
- wit-bindgen
- wit-component
- wit-parser

### Usage

```rust
use hooksmith::hook_builder;
```
